summary: Annotate dangerously thin power traces; widen 5V/3.3V/GND tracks; suggest GND stitching near MAX485.
notes: Net classes were never set; everything was routed at 0.2mm. Configure Default=0.25, Power=0.6 in Board Setup -> Net Classes.
RX/TX/RST nets have only 1 pad each in the schematic - confirm a header is intentionally not placed.
GND has 5 vias for 72 pads. With one zone fill, that's relying on the pour for return paths; add stitching vias near high-speed signals.
